description_long: This is a grand, multi-tiered traditional East Asian temple with a sweeping, golden-tiled roof and ornate architectural details. The structure features a prominent central staircase leading up to a large entrance flanked by red columns, supporting an extended roof eave. The roof is adorned with intricate ridges and a decorative finial at the apex, while the eaves curve gracefully upward at the corners. The building sits on a raised stone platform, and the facade is richly decorated with wooden latticework and ornamental brackets. The symmetry and scale of the building suggest it is a significant historical or cultural landmark, likely used for ceremonial or religious purposes. The overall design is harmonious, with a strong emphasis on balance, proportion, and traditional craftsmanship.
description: A grand, multi-tiered East Asian temple with a sweeping golden roof, red columns, and ornate wooden details, set on a raised stone platform. The structure is richly decorated and exudes historical and cultural significance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main staircase, central entrance, and symmetrical red columns beneath the wide, golden roof.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated front view, still highlighting the entrance and columns, with more of the right side eaves visible.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, similar to the front but with more of the left side eaves and columns visible.
description_view_3: Nearly identical to the front view, with the central staircase and entrance directly facing the viewer.
